title: Contribution by Tencent: wrong default value of geometry column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (id UInt32, geom Nullable(String) DEFAULT 'POINT(0 0)');
SELECT id, geom FROM t2 WHERE geom IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE t3 AS SELECT 'POINT(1 1)' AS geom;
key_bug_features: Wrong default value for geometry column with binlog_format=row
